text: The universe is expanding faster than ever — but why? Cosmologists use the term dark energy to describe this mysterious force. It's not just a name. Dark energy could make up about 70% of the universe. Recent studies hint at its influence on cosmic structures and fate. Yet, we barely understand what it really is or how it works. Want to dive deeper into the mysteries of the cosmos? Hit follow for more!
